/-- The parser for swap rules -/
meta def swapRule : Lean.ParserDescr‚úĚ :=
  ParserDescr.nodeWithAntiquot‚úĚ "swapRule" `Mathlib.Tactic.swapRule
    (ParserDescr.binary‚úĚ `andthen
      (ParserDescr.binary‚úĚ `andthen
        (ParserDescr.binary‚úĚ `andthen (ParserDescr.const‚úĚ `ident)
          (ParserDescr.unary‚úĚ `optional (ParserDescr.symbol‚úĚ " ‚ÜĒ")))
        (ParserDescr.const‚úĚ `ppSpace))
      (ParserDescr.const‚úĚ `ident))

docString:
`swap_var swap_rule‚āĀ, swap_rule‚āā, ‚čĮ` applies `swap_rule‚āĀ` then `swap_rule‚āā` then `‚čĮ`.

A `swap_rule` is of the form `x y` or `x ‚ÜĒ y`, and "applying it" means swapping the variable name
`x` by `y` and vice-versa on all hypotheses and the goal.

```lean
example {P Q : Prop} (q : P) (p : Q) : P ‚ąß Q := by
  swap_var p ‚ÜĒ q
  exact ‚ü®p, q‚ü©
```
